---
title: "Quarto using reference"
number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```


# Figure references
See @fig-1.
```{r}
#| label: fig-1
#| fig-cap: "Histogram of speed"

# hist(mtcars$wt)
 
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt)) +   geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.3)
```

## Exercise 1
Render the document. Fix the errors by adding the figure number and title appropriately.
```{r}
#| label: fig-1
#| fig-cap: Boxplot of mpg

# hist(cars$speed)
 
ggplot(mtcars, aes(y = mpg)) +   geom_boxplot()
```
